title: snapshot
description: Full current state of a space at a given revision. Sent unicast to a single requesting viewer, in reply to `resume` or the initial `subscribe`. Never persisted itself and never increments space_revision (it reports a revision that was already reached by prior reliable events).

messages.description: Recent messages only. The server MAY truncate this to a bounded window (implementations SHOULD document their own cap, e.g. the most recent 200); a snapshot is not a durability guarantee for message history.
